description: Clean up stale tooling configuration entries that produce unnecessary noise during contributor quality checks: remove a stale knip ignore pattern and migrate ESLint react-hooks from legacy FlatCompat wrapper to native flat config.

userStories.title: Remove stale storybook-static ignore from knip.ts
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want `npm run knip` to produce clean output with no configuration hints so that I can focus on real issues.
acceptanceCriteria: `npm run knip` output contains no 'Configuration hints' section
userStories.notes: In `knip.ts` line 52, the `ignore` array contains `'**/storybook-static/**'`. Knip reports: `Configuration hints (1): **/storybook-static/**  knip.ts  Remove from ignore`. Remove this single entry from the array. The ESLint config (`eslint.config.ts` line 45) already ignores `**/storybook-static/**` separately, so knip doesn't need to.

userStories.title: Migrate ESLint react-hooks to native flat config and remove compat deps
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want the ESLint config to use eslint-plugin-react-hooks' native flat config export instead of the legacy FlatCompat wrapper so that unnecessary compatibility dependencies are eliminated.
acceptanceCriteria: `@eslint/compat` and `@eslint/eslintrc` are removed from root `package.json` devDependencies
`npm run lint` produces the same 2 warnings about react-hooks/exhaustive-deps in App.tsx (expected with React Compiler) and 0 errors
userStories.notes:
In `eslint.config.ts`:

1. Remove imports: `fixupConfigRules` from `@eslint/compat`, `FlatCompat` from `@eslint/eslintrc`, and `FixupConfigArray` type from `@eslint/compat` (lines 1-2, 10)
2. Add import: `import reactHooks from 'eslint-plugin-react-hooks'` (note: this is a default import)
3. Replace lines 23-26 (the FlatCompat react-hooks config block):
   ```
   {
     files: ['**/*.tsx'],
     ...fixupConfigRules(new FlatCompat().extends('plugin:react-hooks/recommended-latest') as FixupConfigArray)[0],
   },
   ```
   with:
   ```
   {
     files: ['**/*.tsx'],
     ...reactHooks.configs.flat['recommended-latest'],
   },
   ```
4. In `package.json`, remove `@eslint/compat` and `@eslint/eslintrc` from devDependencies (lines 49-50)
5. Run `npm install` to update the lockfile after removing deps

IMPORTANT: The `eslint-plugin-react-hooks` package does NOT ship TypeScript declarations for its flat config exports. You may need to add a type assertion or declare module types. Check if `reactHooks.configs` type-checks cleanly — if not, use `(reactHooks as any).configs.flat['recommended-latest']` or add a local `.d.ts` declaration. Verify with `npm run type-check`.

Note: `docs/eslint.config.ts` also uses FlatCompat for react-hooks but has its own `@eslint/compat` and `@eslint/eslintrc` in `docs/package.json`. Do NOT touch docs files — only modify root files.
